Access Control.spl_skeleton: index=* (action=login OR action=privilege_grant OR action=user_created) earliest=-90d | stats count by user action
Access Control.evidence_question: Who can access what, how is access provisioned/reviewed, and is MFA enforced?

Logging & Monitoring.spl_skeleton: | metadata type=sourcetypes index=* | eval lag_min=(now()-recentTime)/60 | where lag_min > 60
Logging & Monitoring.evidence_question: Are security-relevant log sources ingested continuously and monitored for failure?

Incident Response.spl_skeleton: index=notable earliest=-90d | stats count earliest(_time) latest(_time) by incident_id severity
Incident Response.evidence_question: Are incidents detected, triaged, contained within SLA, and post-mortemed?

Data Protection.spl_skeleton: index=* sourcetype=dlp OR sourcetype=*encryption* earliest=-90d | stats count by host action
Data Protection.evidence_question: Is sensitive data encrypted in transit/at rest, and is data exfiltration detected?

Risk Management.spl_skeleton: | inputlookup asset_inventory | join host [search index=vuln earliest=-30d] | stats max(severity) by host criticality
Risk Management.evidence_question: Are risks identified, scored, and tracked through to remediation?

Vendor Risk.spl_skeleton: index=* (tag=authentication user IN (*vendor*, *contractor*)) earliest=-90d | stats count by user src_ip
Vendor Risk.evidence_question: Is third-party access scoped, logged, and reviewed?

Policy.spl_skeleton: | inputlookup policy_attestations.csv | stats count by user policy_id status
Policy.evidence_question: Are policies acknowledged by users and exceptions tracked?

splunk_hint.evidence_question: Are risks identified, scored, and tracked through to remediation?
